title: NIO on Trending List After Financial Report Release: Still 3.5 Billion Yuan Away from Profitability
text: NIO achieved first quarterly net profit milestone in Q4 2025 showing company narrowing losses and approaching sustained profitability. Company posted non-GAAP net income approximately $104 million in Q4 2025 alongside record deliveries 124,807 vehicles. Full year 2025 gross margin reached 13.6% versus 9.9% prior year with Q4 achieving 17.5% gross margin. Management targets over 20% comprehensive gross profit margin in 2026. Profitability path shows company transitioning from loss-making to break-even operations. Continued cost optimization and higher-margin vehicle mix supporting margin expansion. Forward guidance indicates company approaching sustained profitability with non-GAAP operating profit break-even forecast for fiscal 2026. Net loss improvement trajectory from quarterly to eventual full-year profitability represents major milestone in company turnaround narrative.
